title: Kristal Eng’s CV
text:
Contact Information
Mobile: +1 (208) 973-5574
Email: kristaleng.by@gmail.com

title: Kristal Eng’s CV
text:
Work Experience
Data Intern, Apr 2025 - Jan 2026
The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints - Idaho | USA

Utilized MS Excel to analyze large amount of data, reducing data discrepancies by 40% and cutting operations cost by 3%
Designed and implemented an inventory management system by creating MS Forms surveys, analyzing over 60 responses to ensure accurate records for improved tracking and accountability
Developed and optimized interactive dashboards in MS Excel, accelerating decision-making speed by 25%
Dispatched over 100 work orders to vendors by identifying issues and coordinating through a centralized system, ensuring timely service and shortening average response time by 20%

Teacher’s Assistant, Oct 2023 - current
Brigham Young University - Idaho | USA

Reduced grade turnaround time by 50% from 4 days to 2 days through prioritization and time management
Guided 50+ students, offering personalized assistance through active listening and targeted guidance, boosting academic performance for over 80% of students helped
Increased student focus and participation by 20% by collaborating with teachers to manage classrooms of 30+ diverse students and implementing effective strategies

Paralegal, Aug 2022 - Feb 2023
Nanyang Law LLC | Singapore

Increased workflow efficiency by 15% by delivering administrative support to legal department including scheduling, claims processing, and daily operations
Edited and proofread 50+ contracts, formal correspondence, and legal filings, ensuring 100% accuracy and compliance with relevant legislation and regulations
Improved departmental efficiency by 10% by managing and maintaining legal databases and tracking systems using MS Excel, streamlining data retrieval processes

title: Kristal Eng’s CV
text:
Project
Stock Financial Analysis Model
Brigham Young University - Idaho

Created a financial statement dashboard tool in MS Excel allowing user to select multiple drop downs and view multiple graphs showing trends over time for Balance Sheet and Income Statement
Used STOCKHISTORY(), XLOOKUP(), and conditional logic functions to do fundamental stock analysis connected to web

title: Kristal Eng’s CV
text:
Key Skills

Data Analysis: MS Excel, SQL, Python, R
Business Intelligence Tools: Tableau, Power BI, Corrigo
Language: English, Mandarin Chinese
Other Skills: MS PowerPoint, MS Word, MS Forms, Bloomberg
Soft Skills: Teamwork, Communication, Problem Solving, Time Management
